recommendations.route: Basra Terminal -> Vadinar via Strait of Hormuz
recommendations.tanker_availability: 1 VLCC available within 96h due to regional risk
recommendations.diversification_value: low - route transits the disrupted Strait of Hormuz
recommendations.rationale: Fully compatible with Jamnagar (RIL)'s complex_sour crude configuration. While it uses established contracts, transiting the Strait of Hormuz during this active disruption adds a high risk premium (+$10.80/bbl) and severe transit congestion (+121.0h delay), making it expensive and slow.
